attempts.reflection:
You failed to craft the dropper because you attempted to create advanced items like iron pickaxe and furnace before gathering sufficient resources and crafting tables/furnaces. Specifically, you tried to craft an iron pickaxe when you only had one iron ingot, and you repeatedly tried to craft a furnace without enough cobblestone. Additionally, you missed the opportunity to craft a wooden pickaxe earlier, which would have helped you mine more efficiently. 

To succeed, first craft a crafting table, then use it to make a wooden pickaxe. Mine more cobblestone and iron ore, smelt the iron ore into iron ingots, and craft an iron pickaxe. Use the iron pickaxe to mine more cobblestone and iron ore, and finally, craft a furnace to smelt additional iron ores. Once you have the necessary materials, you can craft the dropper.

attempts.reflection: You need to first craft a crafting table using 4 oak planks. Then use the crafting table to craft more oak planks and other necessary items. Specifically, after obtaining the oak logs, you should immediately craft the oak planks before attempting to craft the crafting table again. Repeat this process until you have enough oak planks to craft the table. Once you have the crafting table, use it to craft additional oak planks and then proceed to craft the dropper.
